raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What's on your mind","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Kenji set context before anything feels diagnostic.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Expectation picture","name":"What feels clearest about what good looks like in your role right now?","description":"Surfaces where expectations are already solid so the conversation can narrow to the unclear parts.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Unclear expectations","name":"What feels most unclear about expectations right now?","description":"Gets specific about the parts of the role definition that are still fuzzy at the three-month mark.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Help-seeking safety","name":"What makes it easiest or hardest to ask for help here?","description":"Explores whether he feels safe surfacing questions or blockers without making it a complaint.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Requirements churn","name":"What part of the shifting requirements has been hardest to work with?","description":"Separates the churn itself from decision ownership or tradeoff problems.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Frustration source","name":"What's been most frustrating about the way the work is changing?","description":"Lets him name the specific friction without assuming the root cause.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team setup friction","name":"What part of our team setup is making your work harder than it needs to be?","description":"Surfaces process or ownership issues that are adding avoidable drag.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager support","name":"What would you want more of from me in the day-to-day loop?","description":"Finds the concrete support change that would reduce friction for him.","purpose":"topic","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next stretch","name":"As you think about the next stretch, what would help you feel more settled in the role?","description":"Anchors growth in the current moment while pointing toward steadier footing.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Steadier next two weeks","name":"What would make the next two weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes by turning the conversation into immediate support and next steps.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]}]}
